subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the call of this Youth, by the radiance of Whose countenance the heavens and earth were illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا غلام اسمع ندآء هذا الغلام الذی بنور وجهه اشرقت السموات و الارض و لو
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
